mapper.sql: id, role_key, role_name, permissions_json, enabled, built_in, sort_order, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_admin_role ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM app_admin_role WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE app_admin_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, permissions_json = #{permissionsJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_admin_role SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
